steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The student's goal is explicitly stated: indicate when the board game was released. The notes contain one piece of information that directly answers this: “It was released in 2005.”

steps.title: Select the choice that fulfills the goal
steps.content: Choice B uses the release date (2005) from the notes to accomplish the stated goal. The other three choices reference the designer, the horror story source, or Lovecraft's authorship—information that does not address when the game was released. That matches choice B — B is correct.
